#  Generate and Print QR Codes for Drawings 
##  Background 
You can generate and print a QR Code for a drawing so that the drawing can easily be viewed in the Procore Mobile app.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Standard' level permissions or higher to the project's Drawings tool.   
_Note:_ For users to view the drawing, they must have 'Read Only' level permissions or higher to the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * QR code must be scanned with the Procore app:* [Scan a QR Code (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/mobile-android-general/tutorials/scan-a-qr-code-with-the-procore-camera-to-view-an-item-android)* [Scan a QR Code (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/mobile-ios-general/tutorials/scan-a-qr-code-with-the-procore-camera-to-view-an-item-ios)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Select the **drawing area**.
  3. Click **Number** next to the drawing to generate a QR code. 
  4. Click the **QR Code** ![Icon Qr Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5b48e3548b0ed42db892a1667b2d71e9/5dd53a4a06bcd98549c18f199017aea2/icon-qr-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon.
  5. Click **Print QR Code**.
  6. Click **Print**.


## See Also
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Insights Pilot Questions](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-insights-pilot-questions)
  * [What can I ask Assist?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-can-i-ask-assist)
